title: Project Miner Local PM Operating Queue
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM interpretation burden by surfacing a browser-local operating queue in the Project Miner intake workbench, derived from local checklist, local decision-draft, and approval-persistence readiness state, while preserving the no-write boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / Local Intake Workbench Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a browser-local Local PM Operating Queue panel to /pm-review/import-intake.
Place the queue immediately after the intake summary so the PM sees next review moves early.
Derive complete, next, and blocked statuses from local checklist state, local approval-decision draft completeness, and approval-persistence readiness gates.
Include the operating queue status and details in the browser-generated Markdown PM brief.
Extend the focused import-intake smoke to prove initial and updated queue status, exact GET read seams, localStorage behavior, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.

queue_items.title: Review source and exceptions
queue_items.status_rule: complete only when source freshness and warning review checklist items are both checked locally

queue_items.title: Prepare local decision draft
queue_items.status_rule: complete only when decision value, review notes, and local-only attestation are present

queue_items.title: Export review artifacts
queue_items.status_rule: next only when local checklist evidence and approval preview context are ready

queue_items.title: Hosted parity executor closeout
queue_items.status_rule: blocked until PM Lane 041A/041B close or classify hosted parity

queue_items.title: Approval persistence implementation
queue_items.status_rule: blocked because PM Lane 049 remains design-only and no schema or adapter implementation is admitted

queue_items.title: Project import packet
queue_items.status_rule: blocked until approval persistence is admitted and green in a later packet

allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for boundary and placement review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after refreshing the production build.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
